orchestrator_notes: Orchestrator is monitoring from the main terminal. Agents: read this file BEFORE starting work and AFTER completing work. If you see a STOP instruction in orchestrator_directives, halt immediately and notify the user.

sessions.title: DB Migration & Sumy Wiring
planned_tasks: Wire Sumy output at 3 injection points (create, update, regenerate)
TDD tests for all new code
tasks_completed: Created vision_document_summaries table via Alembic migration (0842a_vds)
Added extraction_custom_instructions TEXT column to products table
Added VisionDocumentSummary SQLAlchemy model to products.py
Registered VisionDocumentSummary in models/__init__.py
Added 4 repository methods: create_summary (upsert), get_summaries, get_best_summary, get_product_summaries
Wired _persist_sumy_summaries helper at all 3 injection points (create, update, regenerate)
Fixed regenerate_summaries missing consolidation trigger
8 TDD tests passing
sessions.notes_for_next: Model class: VisionDocumentSummary (src/giljo_mcp/models/products.py:659). Repo methods on VisionDocumentRepository: create_summary(session, tenant_key, document_id, product_id, source, ratio, summary, tokens_original, tokens_summary), get_summaries(session, tenant_key, document_id), get_best_summary(session, tenant_key, document_id, ratio) -> AI preferred, get_product_summaries(session, tenant_key, product_id, ratio). Ratio uses Decimal('0.33') and Decimal('0.66'). Source values: 'sumy' and 'ai'. The extraction_custom_instructions column is on Product model. Old summary columns on VisionDocument still written (backward compat).
cascading_impacts: 0842b needs to use get_best_summary and get_product_summaries for Context Manager reads
0842c needs to write source='ai' summaries via create_summary when gil_write_product is called
sessions.summary: Created vision_document_summaries table, VisionDocumentSummary model, and 4 repository methods. Wired Sumy output to new table at all 3 endpoint injection points (create, update, regenerate). Fixed pre-existing gap where regenerate_summaries did not trigger consolidation. 8 TDD tests pass. Commit: 71868be1.

sessions.title: Context Manager Summary Reads
planned_tasks: Multi-doc aggregation with doc name headers
TDD tests for AI-preference and fallback
tasks_completed: Skipped get_product_summaries repo method (already done by 0842a)
Updated _get_summary_response() to query vision_document_summaries table with AI preference via VisionDocumentRepository.get_product_summaries()
Added _build_aggregated_summary() for multi-doc concatenation with # DocName headers (single-doc returns plain text)
Added DEPTH_RATIO_MAP constant for light->0.33, medium->0.66 mapping
Fallback to Product.consolidated_vision_* columns when no rows in new table
Added session and db_manager params to _get_summary_response(), updated call sites
Refactored get_vision_document() with _test_session param for test isolation
6 TDD tests passing in test_0842b_context_manager_summaries.py
All 8 existing 0842a tests still pass (14 total)
deviations: Skipped Phase 1 (repo method) — already implemented by 0842a
sessions.notes_for_next: _get_summary_response() now accepts session+db_manager params. get_vision_document() passes both from its async session context. The _test_session parameter on get_vision_document() allows tests to inject a session. _build_aggregated_summary() uses product.vision_documents to look up document names. Single-doc products get plain text (no header), multi-doc products get '# DocName\n{summary}' concatenated with double newlines. Pagination behavior unchanged.
cascading_impacts: 0842c: When writing AI summaries via gil_write_product, use create_summary with source='ai'. The context manager will automatically prefer these over Sumy.
0842e: Integration tests should verify AI preference end-to-end (upload -> sumy written -> AI write -> context manager returns AI summary)
sessions.summary: Updated _get_summary_response() to read from vision_document_summaries table with AI-preferred source selection, falling back to Product.consolidated_vision_* columns when no summaries exist. Added _build_aggregated_summary() for multi-document header concatenation. 6 new TDD tests + 8 existing = 14 passing. Commit: 213cf204.

sessions.title: MCP Tools & Extraction Prompt
planned_tasks: Create vision_analysis.py with VISION_EXTRACTION_PROMPT + tool functions
Register tools in mcp_http.py (schema + dispatch + allowlist)
Extract shared field writer from ProductTuningService
tasks_completed: Created src/giljo_mcp/tools/vision_analysis.py with VISION_EXTRACTION_PROMPT, FIELD_MAP, gil_get_vision_doc, gil_write_product
Added get_vision_doc() and write_product_from_analysis() wrapper methods to ToolAccessor
Registered both tools in mcp_http.py: _TOOL_SCHEMA_PARAMS allowlist, _build_vision_analysis_tools() schema, handle_tools_list, tool_map dispatch
WebSocket vision:analysis_complete event emission from gil_write_product via EventFactory.tenant_envelope
Added vision:analysis_complete to frontend EVENT_MAP in websocketEventRouter.js
14 TDD tests passing in test_0842c_vision_analysis_tools.py
deviations: Skipped extracting shared field writer from ProductTuningService — the two code paths differ enough that forced sharing would add complexity without benefit
sessions.notes_for_next: MCP tool names as registered: 'gil_get_vision_doc' and 'gil_write_product'. WebSocket event type: 'vision:analysis_complete' with data: {product_id, fields_written, fields}. ToolAccessor methods: get_vision_doc() and write_product_from_analysis(). The frontend EVENT_MAP entry exists but only logs — 0842d should add the full UI handler. Both tools accept _test_session parameter for test isolation. The write tool uses **fields kwargs for all optional product fields. Summaries written via VisionDocumentRepository.create_summary() with source='ai' and Decimal ratios.
cascading_impacts: 0842d: vision:analysis_complete event handler in EVENT_MAP needs real UI logic (currently logs only)
0842e: Integration test should call gil_get_vision_doc then gil_write_product end-to-end and verify all 4 normalized tables + summaries
sessions.summary: Implemented gil_get_vision_doc and gil_write_product MCP tools with merge-write semantics, field name translations, AI summary persistence via VisionDocumentRepository, and vision:analysis_complete WebSocket emission. Registered both tools in mcp_http.py (schema, dispatch, allowlist) and ToolAccessor. 14 TDD tests pass. Commit: a24dbc4c.
